name: Coastal Indoor Golf
about: Coastal Indoor Golf is a retail golf shop in Jacksonville Beach, FL, featuring a state-of-the-art simulator combining TrackMan 4 technology with TruGolf's e6 software. The venue provides a comprehensive indoor golf experience including a perfect putting green for short game practice, club fitting and re-gripping services, top-quality equipment and apparel, and instruction from a PGA Professional. It is marketed as 'Jacksonville's home to indoor Fittings, Lessons, & Fun!', positioning itself as more than just a typical indoor driving range or virtual golf center.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines TrackMan 4 and TruGolf's e6 software for the most realistic indoor golf experience
Offers club fitting, re-gripping, and instruction from a PGA Professional
Provides over 26 separate swing metrics for detailed game analysis
Hosts leagues, events, and virtual tournaments with global participation

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service
No mention of alcohol service or bar facilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue also offers club rentals and has a pro shop for equipment needs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so it appears to be a bring-your-own-venue.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While exact timeframes aren't specified, simulator play generally takes 2-3 hours for 18 holes depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with leagues, events, and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
